Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within or close to normal limits except for mildly decreased total CO₂ and low total cholesterol. The low CO₂ may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation for respiratory alkalosis; clinical correlation is advised. Low cholesterol can be seen in elderly patients and may reflect nutritional status or chronic illness. No evidence of renal dysfunction or diabetes. Overall, results are largely unremarkable.
